zh.lifeSummary: 當Helisende d'Eu於1120年出生在英國英格蘭肯特武爾可姆時，她的父親Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I43歲，母親Margaret Sully20歲。她於1138年與Reginald de St Leger在英國素可瓦特林結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1150年在英國英格蘭素可瓦特林享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: d'Eu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ravindra, Sohini, Vivek, Ajay, Alok, Anil, Annapurna, Daya, Ganga, Goutam, Harnek, Indra.

Indian (northern states): from Sanskrit deva ‘deity, lord’. This was a title used by ruling families in northern India. There is a Jat tribe called Deo. In northeastern India this name is spelled and pronounced Deb . Elsewhere, a common variant is Dev .
Italian: from a short form of the personal names Amadeo, Laudadeo, or Sperindeo, of which only the first now remains in use as a personal name.

variants.name: Deb
meanings: Indian (northeastern states): variant of   Deo  , found among Kayasthas.

variants.name: Dev
meanings: Indian: variant of   Deo  . In Maharashtra, Konkanastha Brahmins have a clan called Dev.

en.lifeSummary: When Helisende d'Eu was born in 1120, in Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I, was 43 and her mother, Margaret Sully, was 20. She married Reginald de St Leger in 1138, in Wartling, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1150, in Wartling, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helisende d'Eu est née en 1120, à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Comte d’Eu Henry d'Eu I, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margaret Sully, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Reginald de St Leger en 1138, à Wartling, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1150, à Wartling, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helisende d'Eu 1120 in Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I 43 und ihre Mutter Margaret Sully 20. Sie hat 1138 in Wartling, Sussex, England Reginald de St Leger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1150 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Wartling, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Helisende d'Eu(이)가 1120년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 울코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Sully(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1138년 영국 수세스 워틀링에서 Reginald de St Leger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 워틀링에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Reginald de St Leger em 1138, em Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helisende d'Eu родилась в 1120 г. в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Sully, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald de St Leger в 1138 г. в местности вартлинг, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1150 г. в местности вартлинг, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.
